response: Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), consistently ranked as the world’s top university at **#1**, is a prestigious institution with a rigorous academic environment. Home to **11,500 students**, MIT boasts an exceptionally competitive **3.9% acceptance rate**, reflecting its elite reputation. Annual tuition stands at **$57,590**, though its **$24.6 billion endowment** underscores its financial strength and resources. With **1,069 faculty members** and a legacy of innovation, MIT has produced **98 Nobel laureates**, solidifying its status as a global leader in research and education since its founding in **1861**.
